title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono, a mathematician at Axiom Math and University of Virginia, argues that humans cannot compete with AI on raw knowledge and should instead focus on curiosity and human judgment. He references mathematician Ramanujan's legacy to suggest that true intelligence in the AI age lies in discovering unconventional talent that systems overlook.
